world_alignment.axis_definition: +X points from character_A root toward character_B root; +Z is the horizontal perpendicular.

coordinate_frames.world: meter, Y-up, floor Y=0 after world alignment

schema.mask_semantics: x_pair_mask marks observed/reliable coordinates; false values are filled or derived from weak observations.
